seoTitle: Lagoon Pocket vs Laguna Quays — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lagoon Pocket and Laguna Quays. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lagoon Pocket vs Laguna Quays: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lagoon Pocket and Laguna Quays.
heading: Lagoon Pocket vs Laguna Quays — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lagoon Pocket, Queensland and Laguna Quays, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Laguna Quays has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lagoon Pocket (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lagoon Pocket or Laguna Quays safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lagoon Pocket has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Laguna Quays scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lagoon Pocket scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Laguna Quays scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lagoon Pocket or Laguna Quays?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Laguna Quays has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
